testcase.name: runScenario

error.message: Step [Get the {string}] is defined with 0 parameters at 'stepdef.StepDefenitionRelatedClass.get_the_page_title()'. However, the gherkin step has 1 arguments: * "pageTitle" Step text: Get the "pageTitle"
